files.content: @@directive("'use client'") @@jsxConfig({version: 4, mode: "automatic", module_: "BaseUi.BaseUiJsxDOM"}) open BaseUi.Types @module("tailwind-merge") external cn: (string, option) => string = "twMerge" module Variant = { @unboxed type t = | @as("default") Default | @as("destructive") Destructive } @react.component let make = (~className=?, ~children=?, ~id=?, ~dir=?, ~style=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?) => module Menu = { @react.component let make = ( ~children=?, ~open_=?, ~defaultOpen=?, ~onOpenChange=?, ~onOpenChangeComplete=?, ~modal=?, ) => } module Group = { @react.component let make = (~className="", ~children=?, ~id=?, ~style=?) => } module Portal = { @react.component let make = (~children=?, ~container=?) => } module Trigger = { @react.component let make = ( ~className=?, ~children=?, ~id=?, ~style=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?, ~disabled=?, ~render=?, ~nativeButton=?, ~type_=?, ~ariaLabel=?, ) => { let shouldSetDefaultType = switch (type_, nativeButton, render) { | (None, Some(false), _) | (None, _, Some(_)) | (Some(_), _, _) => false | (None, _, _) => true } if shouldSetDefaultType { } else { } } } module Content = { @react.component let make = ( ~className=?, ~children=?, ~id=?, ~dir=?, ~dataLang=?, ~style=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?, ~align=Align.Start, ~alignOffset=-4., ~side=Side.Bottom, ~sideOffset=8., ) => } module Item = { @react.component let make = ( ~className=?, ~children=?, ~id=?, ~style=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?, ~disabled=?, ~closeOnClick=?, ~inset=?, ~variant=Variant.Default, ) => { string)} className={cn( "focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground data-[variant=destructive]:text-destructive data-[variant=destructive]:focus:bg-destructive/10 dark:data-[variant=destructive]:focus:bg-destructive/20 data-[variant=destructive]:focus:text-destructive data-[variant=destructive]:*:[svg]:text-destructive! not-data-[variant=destructive]:focus:**:text-accent-foreground group/menubar-item gap-1.5 rounded-md px-1.5 py-1 text-sm data-disabled:opacity-50 data-inset:ps-7 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4", className, )} /> } } module CheckboxItem = { @react.component let make = ( ~className=?, ~children=React.null, ~id=?, ~style=?, ~checked=?, ~defaultChecked=?, ~onCheckedChange=?, ~disabled=?, ~closeOnClick=?, ~dataInset=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?, ) => {children} } module RadioGroup = { @react.component let make = (~className="", ~children=?, ~id=?, ~style=?, ~value=?, ~onValueChange=?) => } module RadioItem = { @react.component let make = ( ~className=?, ~children=React.null, ~id=?, ~style=?, ~value=?, ~disabled=?, ~closeOnClick=?, ~dataInset=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?, ) => {children} } module Label = { @react.component let make = (~className=?, ~children=?, ~id=?, ~style=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?, ~dataInset=?) => } module Separator = { @react.component let make = (~className=?, ~children=?, ~id=?, ~style=?) => } module Shortcut = { @react.component let make = ( ~className=?, ~children=?, ~id=?, ~style=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?, ~dataSlot="menubar-shortcut", ) => } module Sub = { @react.component let make = (~children=?, ~open_=?, ~defaultOpen=?, ~onOpenChange=?) => } module SubTrigger = { @react.component let make = ( ~className=?, ~children=React.null, ~id=?, ~style=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?, ~disabled=?, ~dataInset=?, ) => {children} } module SubContent = { @react.component let make = ( ~className=?, ~children=?, ~id=?, ~dir=?, ~dataLang=?, ~style=?, ~onClick=?, ~onKeyDown=?, ~align=Align.Start, ~alignOffset=-3., ~side=Side.InlineEnd, ~sideOffset=0., ) => }
